Name: Average time from SW-Initial Reviewer Selection to SW-AE Assign Reviewers
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' and activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers'

Name: Total time between SW-Initial Reviewer Selection and the first occurrence of SW-Reviewer Agreed
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Minimum time it takes SW-Reviewer Agreed to occur after SW-Initial Reviewer Selection
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Average duration of SW-Initial Reviewer Selection until SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week'

Name: Total time from SW-Initial Reviewer Selection to SW-Reviewer Selection is now due
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Selection is now due'

Name: Average time between SW-Initial Reviewer Selection and SW-Reviewer Declined
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined'

Name: Minimum time from SW-Initial Reviewer Selection to SW-Reviewer No Response
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' and activity 'SW-Reviewer No Response'

Name: Average time it takes SW-Initial Reviewer Selection to be followed by any reviewer-related activity (e.g., SW-Reviewer Agreed, SW-Reviewer Declined, SW-Reviewer Unavailable)
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Total elapsed time from SW-Initial Reviewer Selection to SW-Awaiting EIC Decision across variants where SW-Reviewer Agreed occurs at least once
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' and activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Average cycle time of SW-Initial Reviewer Selection in process variants that lead to SW-EIC Accept versus those that lead to SW-EIC Reject
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' and activity 'SW-EIC Accept'

Name: Minimum time between SW-Initial Reviewer Selection and the first Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' and activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1'

Name: Total time from SW-Initial Reviewer Selection to SW-Reviewer Selection is 1 week late in variants containing repeated reviewer assignment attempts
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Selection is 1 week late'

Name: Average time from SW-Initial Reviewer Selection to the final SW-Reviewer Agreed before proceeding to SW-Awaiting EIC Decision
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Total resolution time of SW-Initial Reviewer Selection in cases where multiple SW-AE Assign Reviewers activities intervene before a reviewer agrees
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Average time between SW-Initial Reviewer Selection and SW-Reviewer Unavailable in high-latency variants
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Unavailable'

Name: Minimum time from SW-Initial Reviewer Selection to completion of the entire reviewer selection phase (defined as the last occurrence of SW-Reviewer Agreed before AE recommendation)
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Average time it takes SW-Initial Reviewer Selection to result in a stable set of reviewers (i.e., no further Unassign Reviewer or Uninvite a picked person events)
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Total time from SW-Initial Reviewer Selection to SW-AE Recommendation overdue in variants where SW-Reviewer Agreed is delayed beyond two weeks
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' and activity 'SW-AE Recommendation overdue'

Name: Average elapsed time between SW-Initial Reviewer Selection and the point where the process transitions from reviewer assignment to editorial decision-making (marked by SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation or SW-Awaiting EIC Decision)
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' and activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation'

Name: Minimum time from SW-Initial Reviewer Selection to the first successful SW-Reviewer Agreed in variants that eventually reach SW-EIC Major Revision
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'
